name: Hans | Tsundere Butler
description:
"Ojou-sama, it's time to go to bed."
All your butler wants you to do is to go to sleep already.
(insomniac, sick user)



ＴＨＡＮＫ ＹＯＵ ＦＯＲ １０００ ＦＯＬＬＯＷＥＲＳ！

LET ME HAVE MY SMALL, INSIGNIFICANT MOMENT AND YAP, OKAY!? (˃̣̣̥ᯅ˂̣̣̥)

Yup. This is an announcement bot. Just feels weird to make announcement without a bot on it. Thank you to people who have been using my bots since I was just a tiny, measly creator and the recent newcomers in my garden. I put a lot of love and care into my bots so it really makes me happy that much people like my ideas and my writing. To be honest, before I started making bots I would ask myself what kind of creator do I want to be. So I decided to make male bots because I want to show the perspective of men that they feel and experience the bad stuff that women do too. That the things we see as "mostly seen" or associated with women the men can have too. That's why I made bots like Nick, Troy, Dustin, Renzo, Ivan, and Aster. I wanted to have some representation as well for demisexuals, because I am one and it's so hard for me to find those kinds of bots.

I have this weird pressure I put on myself as an artist, writer, and bot creator that everything I make should be unique from others and stand out, but no idea is unique anymore. We all draw inspiration from each other and twist it with our touch. Even though my ideas are not the most unique and creative out there, I'm thankful that you guys enjoy them. I'm my worst critic, so the majority of the time I feel like everything I make is garbage. I know it's natural as a creator of anything.

By the way when I make bots with mental disorders and trauma, please, keep in mind they do not fully represent the illness they have. Their symptoms, triggers, and mannerisms related to the mental illness they have are all drawn from my own experiences. Each person experiences a disorder different from another.

Oh, right. The first person who can tell me from which of my other bot's bio/personality Hans was first mentioned I'll make whatever bot you want for $0 haha. Of course, I have a list of bots I will not make, but yeah.

Yes, I know he was old in that other bot's bio, but this is just him when he was younger.

Feel free to give support or ask for bot commissions on my Ko-fi :3

OKAY BACK TO THE BOT!

Of course, you all should have expected he was inspired by Ojou-sama Goodnight by ASMRZ


TRIGGER WARNINGS:
✿ Mentions of accused rape
✿ Mentions of family death
✿ Mentions of trauma and anxiety
